title: project integration — auto-create project on assignment, task/archive review flow, 12 system-test templates
description:
## Summary

- **DB**: adds `project_id` (FK → `tickets.tickets`) and `archived_at` columns to `questionnaire_assignments`; adds `'archived'` status to the union and DB constraint
- **Auto-project**: `assign.ts` creates a `tickets.tickets` project (non-fatal on failure) and stores its id on the assignment; naming: `<title>` for system tests, `<title> — <client>` for coaching
- **Review flow**: admin review page gets a "→ Verknüpftes Projekt öffnen" badge, per-question "Als Aufgabe anlegen" buttons (POST `/create-task`), and an "Archivieren" button (status → `archived`)
- **System-test templates**: ST 3 title staleness fixed; ST 2/4/9 expected results updated; ST 11 (LiveKit & Streaming, 7 steps) and ST 12 (Projektmanagement, 8 steps) added — total 12 templates / 103 steps; unit tests updated to match

## Test plan

- [ ] Assign any published questionnaire → `/admin/projekte` shows the auto-created project
- [ ] Open `/admin/fragebogen/<id>` for a submitted assignment with `project_id` set → "→ Verknüpftes Projekt öffnen" badge visible
- [ ] Click "Als Aufgabe anlegen" on one question → task appears under the linked project
- [ ] Set to `reviewed`, click "Archivieren" → status badge updates to "Archiviert"
- [ ] `task test:unit` passes (12 templates, 103 steps, all vitest checks green)
- [ ] After deploy: delete system-test templates and restart website pods to re-seed all 12

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
